backup_export.title: Backup & Excel export
backup_export.description: Export or import articles and CMS pages in bulk (similar to All-in-One WP Migration spreadsheets). Images are not embedded — re-upload covers after import when needed.

backup_export.export_sheet_blogs: blogs — all articles with AR/EN fields
backup_export.export_sheet_services: services — full page builder data in payload_json
backup_export.import_note_services: Services: keep payload_json intact (sections + basic info). Cover images are not imported from Excel.
backup_export.export_sheet_about: about_us_json — full About Us JSON (export reference)
backup_export.import_description: Upload a backup file exported from this tool. Rows with an id update existing records; empty id creates new ones.
